economic_notes: Nation operates Kitasoo Seafoods Ltd., Kitasoo Development Corporation, Kitasoo Hydro Power Ltd., Kitasoo Forest Company Ltd., Klemtu Tourism Ltd., Kitasoo Band Store Ltd., Kitasoo Development GP Ltd., and Kitasoo Aqua Farm Ltd. Also holds 50% joint venture interest in vessel Western Princess and 25% interest in Central Coast Commercial Fisheries Limited Partnership. Enterprise Fund includes fisheries, forestry, hydro, tourism, and retail operations.
notes: Financial statements are Summary Financial Statements covering year ended March 31, 2023. Eight subsidiaries accounted for under modified equity method. Two equity-method investments (Western Princess joint venture 50%, Central Coast Commercial Fisheries LP 25%). Auditor firm identified by engagement partner Mike Chang CPA CA of Port Coquitlam BC firm. Total government transfers estimated to include ISC $13,503,521, FNHA $1,350,249, Province of BC $882,918, BC FN Gaming $606,744, Coast Opportunity Funds $1,032,537, CCIRA $530,030, Coastal FN LNG $327,404, DFO $561,756, First Nation Drinking Water Settlement $500,000, FNESC $563,763, Resource Stewardship $962,068, Treaty Negotiations $429,833, Social Housing Fund $243,888 = $21,494,711 less deferred revenue adjustment applied proportionally; OSR calculation approximate. No remuneration schedule included in the document. Prior year accumulated surplus opening was $59,870,233 per Statement 2 but closing 2022 balance shown as $69,233,041 on Statement of Financial Position — both figures appear in the statements.
